name: guardian-vscode
description: Architectural intelligence inside your editor — by ToolBaux

guardian.backendRoot.description: Path to backend root (relative to workspace).

guardian.frontendRoot.description: Path to frontend root (relative to workspace).

guardian.output.description: Path for drift report output (relative to workspace).

guardian.configPath.description: Optional path to guardian.config.json (relative to workspace).

guardian.commandPath.description: Optional path to the guardian CLI. Defaults to workspace node_modules/.bin or global.

guardian.appendHistory.description: Append a drift history entry on each run.

guardian.historyPath.description: Optional path for drift history JSONL. If empty, SpecGuard uses its default.

guardian.writeBaseline.description: Write a baseline drift file on each run.

guardian.baselinePath.description: Optional path for baseline JSON. If empty, SpecGuard uses its default.

guardian.baselineSummaryPath.description: Optional path for baseline architecture summary JSON.

guardian.simulationOutput.description: Output path for drift simulation report.

guardian.runOnSave.description: Run drift check on file save.

guardian.showOutputOnRun.description: Show the SpecGuard output channel when a run starts.

guardian.autoExtract.description: Automatically run extract + context injection on file save (debounced 5s).
